public.prompt: On phones our landing page takes a long time before anything shows up, and the big top picture pushes everything down once it finally arrives so the layout lurches. I want the heavy media fetched and ordered so the first meaningful view shows sooner and nothing jumps around afterward. How would you approach this, and how could I prove the page actually got faster?
public.outputContract: A surface-aware plan with concrete load-ordering changes plus the exact measurement commands that prove the gain.
